sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n70081" key="nekrobarh/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">νεκρο-βᾰρής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ές</itype>, <sense id="n70081.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">laden with the dead,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἄκατος</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.273</biblScope> </bibl> </cit> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crin.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
